chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3011 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15891/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.15892/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 03.11.2025 M/s. Muhammad Jamil and Sarosh Jamil, Advocates for Applicant a/w Applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicants/accused Ayub Siddiqui Ahmed Butt son of Khawaja Siddique Ahmed Butt and Muhammad Saeed Aslam son of Mohammad Aslam seek protective bail in FIR No.06/2022 under Section-409/420/109 PPC, 1860 r/w Section 5 PCA-II, 1947, registered at P.S FIA ACC, Karachi. Learned counsel for the applicants/accused inter alia contends the applicants/accused are innocent and have been falsely implicated through supplementary charge sheet dated 25.07.2024, which was accepted by the Link Judge, Special Court Central-II, Karachi vide order dated 02.10.2025 while exonerating the main accused in the instant crime and accepted the supplementary charge sheet against the present applicants; that the applicants intend to surrender before the trial Court for bail but apprehend of their imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the Court, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 05 days from today i.e 03.11.2025 to 07.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Learned counsel for the applicants/accused inter alia contends the applicants/accused are innocent and have been falsely implicated through supplementary charge sheet dated 25.07.2024, which was accepted by the Link Judge, Special Court Central-II, Karachi vide order dated 02.10.2025 while exonerating the main accused in the instant crime and accepted the supplementary charge sheet against the present applicants; that the applicants intend to surrender before the trial Court for bail but apprehend of their imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the Court, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 05 days from today i.e 03.11.2025 to 07.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicants are directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 05 days period i.e. 07.11.2025 or when the Applicants surrender themselves before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, 2 however, made clear that in case, the applicants fail to make their appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
